title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
